TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Taur_Matan_Ruak, title = Taur_Matan_Ruak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taur_Matan_Ruak} }

S.FORM: Taur Matan Ruak I 1956 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci Taur Matan Ruak, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Timor-leste anini i ci Taur Matan Ruak, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: tao~u~ur matan ro~u~uak i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i tao~u~ur matan ro~u~uak, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u timo~ur-…ĺ…ôst…ô anini i ¶i tao~u~ur matan ro~u~uak, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Taur Matan Ruak I 1956 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci Taur Matan Ruak, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Timor-leste anini i ci Taur Matan Ruak, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
